goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should be in the 'west'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should be in the west
The hotel should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get address and postcode
